headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -27.8)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 81% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations remain dominant with 124 quotes (79 at strong intensity), though the score dropped significantly from yesterday's peak.
• Optimism hits a notably low point at -22.8, well below its typical range and declining from yesterday.
• Fears improved from yesterday but stay negative with 51 quotes, mostly moderate intensity.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
